# MyZoneTime — robots.txt
# https://myzonetime.com

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /world-clock$
Disallow: /embed/
Disallow: /world-clock?search=
Disallow: /api/

# Googlebot
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Mobile
Allow: /

# Bingbot
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Other search engines
User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 3

User-agent: YandexBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# AI Crawlers — allow for AEO / Answer Engine Optimization
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

# Social media crawlers
User-agent: FacebookExternalHit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

User-agent: WhatsApp
Allow: /

User-agent: Slackbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Discordbot
Allow: /

# Block scraper / SEO tool bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: PetalBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Disallow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://myzonetime.com/sitemap.xml
